_meta.method: Claude Code research agent (general-purpose) — multi-network web crawl across AZB (Association Zen de Belgique / Belgische Zen Vereniging), AZI (zen-azi.org), Sotoshu Europe, ABZE, Kwan Um Europe, Daisen Centre Zen, Komyodo Leuven (Kanshoji-affiliated), Zen Sangha (White Plum / Frank De Waele Roshi), Wolk en Water, Aandacht.net (Plum Village/Thich Nhat Hanh), and Belgian Buddhist Union (buddhism.be).
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~70-80% of an estimated 35-45 active Zen practice places in Belgium. Strong on AZB-federated dojos, Plum Village sanghas, and the major White Plum / Kosen / Kanshoji networks. Weaker on Vietnamese diasporic Thiền pagodas (chùa) and small informal zazen groups.
knownGaps: Several charleroizen.be / shikantaza.be / azb.be subpages refused fetch (TLS/connection errors) — Charleroi Kanshoji-affiliated and Mons Shikantaza details verified through cached search snippets only.
Sanbō Zen has no confirmed Belgian dojo — search returned none active.
Plum Village contact pages return only group names without street addresses; sangha-level addresses listed where confirmable.
Vietnamese Thiền pagodas of the Vietnamese diaspora (chùa) in Liège/Brussels not enumerated — likely separate Pure Land/Zen hybrid; out of scope for this pass.
Some AZI smaller groupes (correspondants) without dedicated websites omitted.

places.name: Kannon Dojo Zen de Bruxelles
